headline: E.W. Scripps (SSP) Reports Q1 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
summary: E.W. Scripps (SSP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +4.76% and -0.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
